docs.title: Content
docs.text: Storyboard guides, content trackers, and screenshot capture references for Articulate module development.

docs.title: Content Trackers
docs.text: • Track 1 Content — Intro to PrePass — Shared deliverable status across Intro to PrePass modules

docs.title: Track 1 — Intro to PrePass Storyboards
docs.text:
• M1 — Mission, Vision & Values — Storyboard for Module 1 (Revision 2 — NEO pyramid framing)
  • M3 — PrePass History — Storyboard for Module 3 (Revision 2 — NEO timeline alignment)
  • M4 — PrePass Alliance — Storyboard for Module 4 (Revision 2 — purpose-first reframe)
  • M5 — Customers, Market & Product — Storyboard for Module 5 (New build — four value props framework)
  • M6 — Revenue Model — Storyboard for Module 6 (New build — self-funded nonprofit framing)
  • M7 — Market Goals — Storyboard for Module 7 (New build — strategic priorities snapshot)
